Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd /home/user/repositories/pachimon && cat backend/go.mod | head -5; echo '---'; cat frontend/next.config.ts; echo '---package.json---'; cat frontend/package.json; echo '---env example backend---'; cat backend/.env.example 2>&1")

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cat /home/user/repositories/pachimon/README.md; echo '---gitignore---'; cat /home/user/repositories/pachimon/.gitignore | head -40; echo '---backend embed check---'; grep -rn 'embed' /home/user/repositories/pachimon/backend/internal/db/*.go")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker ps -a --filter name=pachimon; echo '---volumes---'; docker volume ls | grep pachimon")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "pkill -9 -f 'go run ./cmd/server' 2>&1; pkill -9 -f 'exe/server' 2>&1; sleep 1; docker stop pachimon-postgres && docker rm pachimon-postgres; echo done")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker ps -a --filter name=pachimon-postgres; echo '---procs---'; ps aux | grep -i 'go run\\|exe/server' | grep -v grep || echo no_procs")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd /home/user/repositories/pachimon && docker compose up -d --build 2>&1 | tail -80")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd /home/user/repositories/pachimon && docker compose up -d --build 2>&1 | tail -100")

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker compose -f /home/user/repositories/pachimon/docker-compose.yml ps; echo '---healthz---'; curl -s http://localhost:8080/healthz; echo; echo '---frontend---'; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\\n' http://localhost:3000/")

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "curl -s http://localhost:3000/ | grep -o '<title>[^<]*</title>'; echo '---signup via dockerized backend---'; curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/signup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\\"email\\":\\"docker-test@example.com\\",\\"password\\":\\"password123\\",\\"trainerName\\":\\"DockerTester\\"}'")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker logs pachimon-backend --tail 20; echo '---frontend logs---'; docker logs pachimon-frontend --tail 20")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker exec pachimon-frontend sh -c \\"grep -rl '8080' /app/.next/static/chunks 2>/dev/null | head -3\\"")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker exec pachimon-frontend sh -c \\"grep -o 'http://localhost:8080' /app/.next/static/chunks/25r54x--x_h57.js | head -1\\"")

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "curl -sv -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/signup -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3000' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\\"email\\":\\"real-browser-sim@example.com\\",\\"password\\":\\"password123\\",\\"trainerName\\":\\"BrowserSim\\"}' 2>&1 | grep -iE 'access-control|< HTTP|token'")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker exec pachimon-postgres psql -U postgres -d pachimon -c \\"SELECT email, trainer_name, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;\\"")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'cd /home/user/repositories/pachimon/backend && npm install --no-save ws >/dev/null 2>&1 && node -e " *)
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "docker logs pachimon-backend 2>&1 | grep -v healthz | tail -40")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd /home/user/repositories/pachimon && docker compose up -d --build frontend 2>&1 | tail -30")
